creator: tremere@cainites.net
text:
I hadn't enabled SNMP for PowerDNS Recursor and due to the issues with net-snmp (whose upstream believes downstream should fix their messed up netsnmp-config failings) this should fix building the port for everyone not using poudriere but has net-snmp installed.

Unless I can get SNMP to work, a seperate option is not necessary at this time.
